hero.badge: Built for web, mobile, and school trust
hero.title: A safer digital campus for every school community.
hero.subtitle: Olive Buzz combines community updates, student journalism, messaging, and moderation into one calm and modern experience.

pulse.title: Community Pulse
pulse.subtitle: Today's approved highlights
pulse.dailyDigestDesc: Notices, stories, and highlights delivered clearly to families.
pulse.trustedCirclesDesc: School, class, and role-based visibility keeps communication focused.

platform.label: Platform experience
platform.title: Designed to feel simple, warm, and school-first.

safety.label: Safety by design
safety.title: Strong guardrails without sacrificing usability.
safety.desc: Olive Buzz is structured around secure defaults, school moderation, privacy-conscious sharing, and cross-device consistency.
safety.point2: Cleaner permissions for staff and families
safety.point3: Installable app readiness for mobile use
safety.ageAwareDesc: Role-based access helps keep student, parent, teacher, and admin experiences protected.
safety.humanAIDesc: Safety checks and educator review work together to keep school communities healthy.
safety.webAppDesc: The experience is mobile-first, touch-friendly, and prepared for installable app behavior.

launch.label: Ready to launch
launch.title: Olive Buzz now has a stronger product foundation.
launch.desc: This first pass delivers a modern public experience, better trust messaging, responsive layouts, and installable-app preparation for phones and tablets.
